parameters.query: SELECT id, name FROM restaurants WHERE is_active = true

=SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_orders,
  COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as total_revenue,
  COALESCE(AVG(total_amount), 0) as avg_order_value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status = 'delivered' THEN 1 END) as delivered,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END) as cancelled,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN payment_method = 'bank_transfer' THEN 1 END) as bank_transfers,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN payment_method = 'cod' THEN 1 END) as cod_orders
FROM orders
WHERE restaurant_id = '{{ $json.id }}'
  AND DATE(order_placed_at) = CURRENT_DATE

=SELECT item->>'item_name' as item_name,
  SUM((item->>'quantity')::int) as qty
FROM orders, jsonb_array_elements(order_items) as item
WHERE restaurant_id = '{{ $('Get Active Restaurants').item.json.id }}'
  AND DATE(order_placed_at) = CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY item->>'item_name'
ORDER BY qty DESC
LIMIT 5

=INSERT INTO analytics (restaurant_id, date, total_orders, total_revenue, average_order_value, payment_method_breakdown, popular_items)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.restaurant_id }}',
  '{{ $json.date }}',
  {{ $json.total_orders }},
  {{ $json.total_revenue }},
  {{ $json.avg_order_value }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ bank_transfer: $json.bank_transfers, cod: $json.cod_orders }) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.popular_items) }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (restaurant_id, date) DO UPDATE SET
  total_orders = EXCLUDED.total_orders,
  total_revenue = EXCLUDED.total_revenue,
  average_order_value = EXCLUDED.average_order_value,
  payment_method_breakdown = EXCLUDED.payment_method_breakdown,
  popular_items = EXCLUDED.popular_items
